inboxThreads.subject: Rice delivery window update
inboxThreads.preview: Your 5 kg sacks are already on the courier route and should arrive before 17:00.

messages.author: Karawang Grain Union
messages.body: Your rice order has left our East Jakarta fulfillment hub and is now on the courier route.

messages.author: You
messages.body: Noted. Please leave it with the kitchen entrance if I am still out on delivery pickup.

messages.author: Karawang Grain Union
messages.body: Understood. The driver note has been updated for kitchen-entrance handoff.

inboxThreads.subject: Issue review for order TNL-240323-071
inboxThreads.preview: We are coordinating a replacement batch and will update your ETA shortly.

messages.author: TaniLink Support
messages.body: We have received the packing issue report for your egg and chili order and are coordinating with the seller.

messages.author: You
messages.body: Please prioritize a replacement if possible. These items are for evening prep.

messages.author: TaniLink Support
messages.body: Confirmed. We have escalated the ticket and will send a delivery update before 18:00.

inboxThreads.subject: Cold-chain order completed
inboxThreads.preview: Thanks for receiving yesterday's protein delivery. Let us know if you need a repeat order.

messages.author: Cianjur Fresh Protein
messages.body: Thank you for receiving yesterday's chilled delivery. Everything was signed off at 07:42.

messages.author: You
messages.body: Received in good condition. Please keep the same route timing for next week.
